findings.finding: Still no table defines data_version VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1.0'. Unaddressed carry-over.
findings.fix: Add DATA_VERSION: { type: DataTypes.STRING(20), allowNull: false, defaultValue: '1.0' } to each domain entity model (before created_by).

findings.finding: Still use a surrogate UUID PRIMARY KEY plus a separate UNIQUE index instead of a composite PK over the FK columns. Unaddressed carry-over.
findings.fix: Switch to a composite PRIMARY KEY over the two FK columns; drop the redundant UNIQUE index; keep the non-leading FK index.

findings.finding: Still nullable with ON DELETE SET NULL. Unaddressed carry-over.
findings.fix: Make NOT NULL, change FK to ON DELETE CASCADE.

findings.finding: Still nullable with ON DELETE SET NULL. Unaddressed carry-over.
findings.fix: Make NOT NULL + CASCADE, or explicitly document the 'global plan' exception.

findings.finding: Every identifier remains upper-case quoted. Unaddressed carry-over.
findings.fix: Rename to lowercase snake_case in src/models/*.js.

findings.finding: UQ_API_METADATA_NAME_VERSION_ORG still enforces UNIQUE(NAME, VERSION, ORG_UUID). Left as-is per explicit instruction.
findings.fix: Drop UQ_API_METADATA_NAME_VERSION_ORG and rely on UQ_API_METADATA_HANDLE_ORG, when ready.

findings.finding: Mapping tables use singular MAPPING instead of the recommended plural _mappings suffix. Unaddressed carry-over, low priority.
findings.fix: Rename tables to use the _mappings suffix when convenient (cosmetic).
